testcase.name: TC002_OpeningCuraFacebook
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for url to contain "facebook.com". Current url: "https://katalon-demo-cura.herokuapp.com/#" (tried for 5 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.16' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.117, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\cahay\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:47606}, goog:processID: 11468, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:47606/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.117, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: d5aefccedc849c920e437377fc7d42d7 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:85) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:234) at utils.Helper.waitUrlContains(Helper.java:83) at pages.HomePage.clickFacebook(HomePage.java:86) at tests.HomeTests.TC002_OpeningCuraFacebook(HomeTests.java:31) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 32 stack frames

testcase.name: TC004_OpeningCuraDribbble
